zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie於1460年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧時，他的父親Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie15歲，母親Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery-5歲。他於1478年4月20日與Lady Helen Campbell在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1546年9月3日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie于1460年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧时，他的父亲Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie15岁，母亲Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery-5岁。他于1478年4月20日与Lady Helen Campbell在英国苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1546年9月3日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: Scottish spelling of   Montgomery  .

variants.name: Montgomery
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie was born in 1460, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie, was 15 and his mother, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, was -5. He married Lady Helen Campbell on 20 April 1478, in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 3 September 1546, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie est né en 1460, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, avait -5 ans. Il a épousé Lady Helen Campbell le 20 avril 1478, à Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1546, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie 1460 in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie 15 und seine Mutter Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery -5. Er hat am 20. April 1478 in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Helen Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 3. September 1546 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie è nato il nel 1460 nel Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, aveva -5 anni. Lui sposato Lady Helen Campbell il 20 aprile 1478, nel Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerieが1460年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで生まれた時，父Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerieは15歳，母Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomeryは-5歳であった。1478年4月20日にイギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアドラーでLady Helen Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1546年9月3日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで86歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングにて埋葬された。

ko.Ardkinglass, Lochgoilhead, Argyll, Scotl: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 럭고일헤드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie(이)가 1460년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery(은)는 -5세였다. 그는 1478년 4월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르 돌라에서 Lady Helen Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 9월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie nasceu em 1460, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, tinha -5 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Helen Campbell em 20 de abril de 1478, em Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1546, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.Ardkinglass, Lochgoilhead, Argyll, Scotl: лочгоилхид, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie родился в 1460 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, -5. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Helen Campbell 20 апреля 1478 г. в местности доллар, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 3 сентября 1546 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie nació en 1460, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, tenía -5 años. Se casó con Lady Helen Campbell el 20 de abril de 1478, en Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1546, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.
